name: Biscotti Crocanti
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs for one minute.
2. Add sugar, almond and anise flavorings, flour, and baking powder to the egg mixture. Mix thoroughly.
3. Divide the dough into three parts.
4. Roll each part out on a cookie sheet, grating it lengthwise. Brush with milk on top.
5. If desired, roll smaller cookies by making four rolls instead of three.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for several minutes until firm.
7. Cool the biscuits completely.
8. Slice diagonally using a sharp knife.
9. Place the sliced biscuits on a baking sheet and bake again at 425°F (220°C) for 5 to 8 minutes, or until lightly browned.
10. Dust with powdered sugar once cooled. Store in an airtight container for several months.
